{{Infobox character
| name = Blue Knight
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Blue Knight]] wields elemental water as a weapon.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator served as the [[Blue Knight]] of the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c32">''The Captain'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator identifies as the [[Blue Knight]] when entering the combat zone.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Blue Knight]] is the designation used by the pilot when withdrawing.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Blue Knight entering the combat zone,” I said.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
